project: 모핏 (Mofit) - AI Personal Trainer for Android
stack: Kotlin + Jetpack Compose + CameraX + ML Kit Pose Detection + Room + OkHttp + Claude Haiku API, minSdk 26
notes: Run this script from the MofitAndroid/ directory (Android project root).
Before running: create Android project in Android Studio named 'Mofit' with package com.mofit.app at MofitAndroid/
Palm gesture = wrist raised above nose level for 1 second (ML Kit Pose Detection, no extra library needed)
After generation: replace YOUR_CLAUDE_API_KEY in ClaudeService.kt

phases.name: Project Setup: Build Files + Theme
phases.goal: Gradle 의존성 설정, 권한 선언, 디자인 테마 완성

tasks.title: app/build.gradle.kts
tasks.prompt:
Write the complete file app/build.gradle.kts for an Android app called Mofit.

Package: com.mofit.app. minSdk 26, targetSdk 34, compileSdk 34. Enable Jetpack Compose.

Plugins block:
  id("com.android.application")
  id("org.jetbrains.kotlin.android")
  id("com.google.devtools.ksp") version "1.9.22-1.0.17"

android block:
  compileSdk = 34
  defaultConfig: applicationId="com.mofit.app", minSdk=26, targetSdk=34, versionCode=1, versionName="1.0"
  compileOptions: sourceCompatibility=JavaVersion.VERSION_17, targetCompatibility=JavaVersion.VERSION_17
  kotlinOptions: jvmTarget="17"
  buildFeatures: compose=true
  composeOptions: kotlinCompilerExtensionVersion="1.5.10"
  packaging: resources.excludes += "/META-INF/{AL2.0,LGPL2.1}"

dependencies block (use exact versions):
  // Compose BOM
  implementation(platform("androidx.compose:compose-bom:2024.02.00"))
  implementation("androidx.compose.ui:ui")
  implementation("androidx.compose.ui:ui-graphics")
  implementation("androidx.compose.ui:ui-tooling-preview")
  implementation("androidx.compose.material3:material3")
  implementation("androidx.activity:activity-compose:1.8.2")
  implementation("androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-compose:2.7.0")
  implementation("androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx:2.7.0")
  implementation("androidx.navigation:navigation-compose:2.7.7")
  // CameraX
  implementation("androidx.camera:camera-camera2:1.3.1")
  implementation("androidx.camera:camera-lifecycle:1.3.1")
  implementation("androidx.camera:camera-view:1.3.1")
  // ML Kit Pose Detection (accurate)
  implementation("com.google.mlkit:pose-detection-accurate:18.0.0-beta4")
  // Room
  implementation("androidx.room:room-runtime:2.6.1")
  implementation("androidx.room:room-ktx:2.6.1")
  ksp("androidx.room:room-compiler:2.6.1")
  // Network
  implementation("com.squareup.okhttp3:okhttp:4.12.0")
  // JSON
  implementation("com.google.code.gson:gson:2.10.1")
  // DataStore
  implementation("androidx.datastore:datastore-preferences:1.0.0")
  // Coroutines
  implementation("org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android:1.7.3")
  // Core
  implementation("androidx.core:core-ktx:1.12.0")

Write the complete file. No comments.

tasks.title: Theme + MofitApplication
tasks.prompt:
Write these Kotlin files for Android app Mofit (package com.mofit.app).

1. app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/ui/theme/Theme.kt
Jetpack Compose theme for Mofit.
Design rules: black background, monochrome UI, ONE accent color = green = Color(0xFF33CC66).

Define:
object MofitColors {
  val Background = Color(0xFF000000)
  val Surface = Color(0xFF1A1A1A)
  val Border = Color(0xFF404040)
  val TextPrimary = Color(0xFFFFFFFF)
  val TextSecondary = Color(0xFF999999)
  val Accent = Color(0xFF33CC66)
}

@Composable fun MofitTheme(content: @Composable () -> Unit):
  MaterialTheme with darkColorScheme(
    background = MofitColors.Background,
    surface = MofitColors.Surface,
    primary = MofitColors.Accent,
    onBackground = MofitColors.TextPrimary,
    onSurface = MofitColors.TextPrimary
  ), content wrapped in Surface(color=Background).

Also define a Modifier extension:
fun Modifier.cardStyle(): Modifier = this.background(MofitColors.Surface, RoundedCornerShape(12.dp)).padding(16.dp)

2. app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/MofitApplication.kt
Android Application subclass. Creates Room database instance (lazy val db: AppDatabase).
class MofitApplication : Application() {
  val database: AppDatabase by lazy { AppDatabase.create(this) }
}

Imports: android.app.Application, com.mofit.app.data.AppDatabase.
No comments. Fully compilable.

tasks.title: Entities + WorkoutSet model
tasks.prompt:
Write these Kotlin files for Android app Mofit (package com.mofit.app).

1. app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/data/UserProfile.kt
@Entity(tableName="user_profile") data class UserProfile:
  @PrimaryKey val id: Int = 1 (always 1, single user)
  val gender: String
  val heightCm: Int
  val weightKg: Int
  val bodyType: String (slim/normal/muscular)
  val goal: String
  val createdAt: Long = System.currentTimeMillis()

2. app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/data/WorkoutSession.kt
@Entity(tableName="workout_session") data class WorkoutSession:
  @PrimaryKey(autoGenerate=true) val id: Long = 0
  val date: Long = System.currentTimeMillis() (epoch millis)
  val exerciseType: String = "squat"
  val totalReps: Int
  val setCount: Int
  val setsJson: String (JSON array of WorkoutSet)

3. app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/model/WorkoutSet.kt
data class WorkoutSet(val setNumber: Int, val reps: Int, val completedAt: Long)
Make it Serializable. No Room annotations.

All files: package com.mofit.app.data or .model. No comments. Fully compilable with import androidx.room.*

tasks.title: DAO + AppDatabase
tasks.prompt:
Write these Kotlin files for Android app Mofit (package com.mofit.app).

1. app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/data/WorkoutDao.kt
@Dao interface WorkoutDao:
- @Insert(onConflict=OnConflictStrategy.REPLACE) suspend fun upsertProfile(profile: UserProfile)
- @Query("SELECT * FROM user_profile WHERE id=1") fun getProfile(): Flow<UserProfile?>
- @Insert suspend fun insertSession(session: WorkoutSession): Long
- @Query("SELECT * FROM workout_session ORDER BY date DESC") fun getAllSessions(): Flow<List<WorkoutSession>>
- @Query("SELECT * FROM workout_session WHERE date > :startOfDay ORDER BY date DESC") fun getTodaySessions(startOfDay: Long): Flow<List<WorkoutSession>>

2. app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/data/AppDatabase.kt
@Database(entities=[UserProfile::class, WorkoutSession::class], version=1, exportSchema=false)
abstract class AppDatabase : RoomDatabase():
  abstract fun workoutDao(): WorkoutDao
  companion object:
    fun create(context: Context): AppDatabase = Room.databaseBuilder(context, AppDatabase::class.java, "mofit.db").build()

Imports: androidx.room.*, kotlinx.coroutines.flow.Flow, android.content.Context.
No comments. Fully compilable.

phases.name: Pose Analysis Service
phases.goal: CameraX ImageAnalysis + ML Kit Pose Detection으로 관절 추적, 스쿼트 카운팅, 손목 제스처 감지 완성

tasks.title: PoseAnalyzer — CameraX + ML Kit
tasks.prompt:
Write app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/service/PoseAnalyzer.kt for Android.
Package: com.mofit.app.service

This class wraps ML Kit Pose Detection and is used as a CameraX ImageAnalysis.Analyzer.

Data classes (in same file):
data class JointPoint(val name: String, val x: Float, val y: Float, val z: Float, val confidence: Float)
data class PoseResult(val joints: List<JointPoint>, val repCount: Int, val isWristRaised: Boolean, val squatPhase: SquatPhase)
enum class SquatPhase { STANDING, DESCENDING, BOTTOM, ASCENDING }

class PoseAnalyzer(private val onResult: (PoseResult) -> Unit) : ImageAnalysis.Analyzer:

Private fields:
- val detector: PoseDetector = PoseDetection.getClient(AccuratePoseDetectorOptions.Builder().setDetectorMode(AccuratePoseDetectorOptions.STREAM_MODE).build())
- var repCount: Int = 0
- var squatPhase: SquatPhase = SquatPhase.STANDING
- var wristRaisedStartTime: Long = 0L
- var isWristCurrentlyRaised: Boolean = false
val wristRaiseThresholdMs: Long = 1000L

@androidx.camera.core.ExperimentalGetImage
override fun analyze(imageProxy: ImageProxy):
  Get mediaImage = imageProxy.image ?: return imageProxy.close()
  Create InputImage.fromMediaImage(mediaImage, imageProxy.imageInfo.rotationDegrees)
  Call detector.process(inputImage).addOnSuccessListener { pose -> processPose(pose); imageProxy.close() }.addOnFailureListener { imageProxy.close() }

fun processPose(pose: Pose):
  1. Extract joints: for each PoseLandmark type in pose.allPoseLandmarks, create JointPoint(name=landmark.landmarkType.toString(), x=landmark.position3D.x, y=landmark.position3D.y, z=landmark.position3D.z, confidence=landmark.inFrameLikelihood)
  2. Squat counting:
     - Get LEFT_HIP, LEFT_KNEE, LEFT_ANKLE landmarks (use RIGHT as fallback if left confidence < 0.5)
     - All must have inFrameLikelihood > 0.5
     - Calculate knee angle: angleBetween(hip.position, knee.position, ankle.position)
     - State machine:
       STANDING -> DESCENDING when angle < 140f
       DESCENDING -> BOTTOM when angle < 100f
       BOTTOM -> ASCENDING when angle > 120f
       ASCENDING -> STANDING when angle > 155f: repCount++
  3. Wrist raise detection (for set completion gesture):
     - Get LEFT_WRIST or RIGHT_WRIST (whichever has higher confidence)
     - Get NOSE landmark
     - isRaised = wrist.position.y < nose.position.y (in image coords, smaller Y = higher in frame, front camera)
     - If isRaised: if wristRaisedStartTime == 0L set it to System.currentTimeMillis()
       held duration = now - wristRaisedStartTime
       isWristCurrentlyRaised = held duration >= wristRaiseThresholdMs
     - If !isRaised: wristRaisedStartTime = 0L; isWristCurrentlyRaised = false
  4. Call onResult(PoseResult(joints, repCount, isWristCurrentlyRaised, squatPhase))

fun resetReps(): repCount = 0; squatPhase = SquatPhase.STANDING; wristRaisedStartTime = 0L; isWristCurrentlyRaised = false

fun close(): detector.close()

private fun angleBetween(a: PointF3D, vertex: PointF3D, b: PointF3D): Float:
  val v1x = a.x - vertex.x; val v1y = a.y - vertex.y
  val v2x = b.x - vertex.x; val v2y = b.y - vertex.y
  val dot = v1x*v2x + v1y*v2y
  val mag1 = sqrt((v1x*v1x + v1y*v1y).toDouble())
  val mag2 = sqrt((v2x*v2x + v2y*v2y).toDouble())
  if (mag1 == 0.0 || mag2 == 0.0) return 180f
  return Math.toDegrees(acos((dot / (mag1 * mag2)).coerceIn(-1.0, 1.0))).toFloat()

Imports: androidx.camera.core.*, com.google.mlkit.vision.common.InputImage, com.google.mlkit.vision.pose.*, com.google.mlkit.vision.pose.accurate.*, android.graphics.PointF, com.google.mlkit.vision.pose.PoseLandmark, kotlin.math.*
No comments. Fully compilable.

tasks.title: OnboardingScreen
tasks.prompt:
Write app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/ui/onboarding/OnboardingScreen.kt for Android Jetpack Compose.
Package: com.mofit.app.ui.onboarding

@Composable fun OnboardingScreen(onComplete: () -> Unit, viewModel: OnboardingViewModel = viewModel())

ViewModel (in same file):
class OnboardingViewModel(application: Application) : AndroidViewModel(application):
  var step by mutableStateOf(0)
  var gender by mutableStateOf("")
  var height by mutableStateOf(170f)
  var weight by mutableStateOf(70f)
  var bodyType by mutableStateOf("")
  var goal by mutableStateOf("")
  fun save(onComplete: () -> Unit): viewModelScope.launch { db.workoutDao().upsertProfile(UserProfile(gender=gender,heightCm=height.toInt(),weightKg=weight.toInt(),bodyType=bodyType,goal=goal)); onComplete() }
  private val db get() = (getApplication<Application>() as MofitApplication).database

Screen layout: Box(Modifier.fillMaxSize().background(Color.Black)) with Column:

Step indicator: Row of 4 Boxes (8.dp circles), green if <= current step, gray otherwise.

Step 0 — Gender:
  Text('모핏에 오신 걸 환영합니다', white, 24sp, bold)
  Text('나만의 AI 트레이너', gray)
  Row of 2 buttons: '남성' '여성'. Selected = green accent border+text, unselected = gray border.

Step 1 — Body metrics:
  Text('신체 정보를 입력해주세요', white, 20sp, bold)
  Column: Text('키: ${height.toInt()}cm', white); Slider(value=height, range=140f..200f, onValueChange, colors: thumb+active=green)
  Column: Text('체중: ${weight.toInt()}kg', white); Slider(value=weight, range=40f..130f)

Step 2 — Body type:
  Text('체형을 선택하세요', white, 20sp)
  Row of 3 buttons: '슬림' '보통' '근육형'. Same selected/unselected style.

Step 3 — Goal:
  Text('목표를 입력하세요', white, 20sp)
  OutlinedTextField(value=goal, onValueChange, placeholder=Text('예: 3개월 안에 스쿼트 100개', color=gray), colors=dark: border=gray, text=white, cursor=green, focusedBorder=green)

Bottom button: Button('다음' for steps 0-2, '시작하기' for step 3), green background, black text, fullWidth, height 56dp, rounded 14dp.
  For step 3: onClick calls viewModel.save(onComplete)
  Disabled if required field empty.
  For steps 0-2: step++

All background Color.Black, Spacer() to push button to bottom.
No comments. Fully compilable. Imports: androidx.compose.*, androidx.lifecycle.*, com.mofit.app.*

phases.name: Workout Tracking Screen
phases.goal: CameraX 프리뷰 + 관절 오버레이 + 손목 제스처→카운트다운→스쿼트 카운팅 전체 흐름 완성

tasks.title: TrackingViewModel
TrackingScreen + JointOverlay
tasks.prompt:
Write app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/ui/tracking/TrackingScreen.kt for Android Jetpack Compose.
Package: com.mofit.app.ui.tracking

Includes two composables in one file.

1. @Composable fun JointOverlay(joints: List<JointPoint>, modifier: Modifier = Modifier)
Uses Canvas to draw skeleton.
Joint coordinate space: ML Kit returns image coordinates where (0,0) is top-left. The camera preview fills the screen.
For each joint with confidence > 0.5: drawCircle(color=Color(0xFF33CC66), radius=8f, center=Offset(joint.x scaled to canvas width... WAIT — ML Kit pose landmarks return pixel coordinates relative to the input image. We need to scale: scaleX = canvasWidth / imageWidth, but we don't have imageWidth here. Instead, use normalized approach: assume joints are already in canvas-space by using the layoutCoordinates. SIMPLER: draw at (joint.x / imageWidth * canvasSize.width, joint.y / imageHeight * canvasSize.height) where imageWidth=640, imageHeight=480 as constants for now — these will be close enough for portrait front camera.
Actually simplest: draw at Offset(joint.x * canvasSize.width / 480f, joint.y * canvasSize.height / 640f) for portrait 480x640 analysis.

Connection lines (white, strokeWidth=3f) between these landmark type number pairs (PoseLandmark constants as Int):
(11,13),(13,15),(12,14),(14,16),(23,25),(25,27),(24,26),(26,28),(11,12),(23,24)
Look up joints by name containing the number (e.g. name contains "11"). Use: fun findJoint(joints: List<JointPoint>, type: Int) = joints.firstOrNull { it.name.contains(type.toString()) && it.confidence > 0.5 }

2. @Composable fun TrackingScreen(onClose: () -> Unit, viewModel: TrackingViewModel = viewModel())

Need camera permission check. Use rememberLauncherForActivityResult for CAMERA permission.

Set up CameraX in LaunchedEffect:
- val context = LocalContext.current
- val lifecycleOwner = LocalLifecycleOwner.current
- val poseAnalyzer = remember { PoseAnalyzer { result -> viewModel.onPoseResult(result) } }
- val cameraProviderFuture = remember { ProcessCameraProvider.getInstance(context) }
- In LaunchedEffect(Unit): request camera permission, then bind camera.

Camera binding (in DisposableEffect or LaunchedEffect):
  val cameraProvider = cameraProviderFuture.get()
  val preview = Preview.Builder().build()
  val imageAnalysis = ImageAnalysis.Builder().setTargetResolution(Size(480,640)).setBackpressureStrategy(ImageAnalysis.STRATEGY_KEEP_ONLY_LATEST).build()
  imageAnalysis.setAnalyzer(Executors.newSingleThreadExecutor(), poseAnalyzer)
  val cameraSelector = CameraSelector.Builder().requireLensFacing(CameraSelector.LENS_FACING_FRONT).build()
  cameraProvider.unbindAll()
  cameraProvider.bindToLifecycle(lifecycleOwner, cameraSelector, preview, imageAnalysis)
  // connect preview to PreviewView via preview.setSurfaceProvider(previewView.surfaceProvider)

onDispose: cameraProvider.unbindAll(); poseAnalyzer.close()

Layout: Box(Modifier.fillMaxSize().background(Color.Black)):

Layer 1: AndroidView(factory = { ctx -> PreviewView(ctx).apply { implementationMode = PreviewView.ImplementationMode.COMPATIBLE; scaleType = PreviewView.ScaleType.FILL_CENTER }.also { pv -> preview.setSurfaceProvider(pv.surfaceProvider) } }, Modifier.fillMaxSize())

Layer 2: JointOverlay(joints=viewModel.currentJoints, shown only when phase==Tracking)

Layer 3: Overlay UI based on phase:
  PalmDetection:
    Column centered:
      Text('손목을 머리 위로 올려주세요', white, bold, 18sp)
      Text('1초 유지', gray, 14sp)
      CircularProgressIndicator if isWristRaised (green, Modifier.size(48dp))
  Countdown(n):
    Text('$n', white, bold, 80sp) centered, with AnimatedContent
  Tracking:
    Column:
      Row(top): Spacer + Text('Set ${viewModel.completedSets.size+1}', gray, caption) + Spacer + TextButton('종료', white) { viewModel.endWorkout() }
      Spacer()
      Text('${viewModel.currentRepCount}', white, bold, 64sp) centered
      Text('손목을 올리면 다음 세트', gray, 14sp)
      Spacer()
  Finished:
    Box full black 0.85 alpha overlay:
      Column centered:
        Text('운동 완료!', white, bold, 28sp)
        Text('총 ${viewModel.totalReps}회 · ${viewModel.completedSets.size}세트', white, 18sp)
        Button(onClick = { viewModel.saveAndClose(onClose) }, green, full width) { Text('저장하고 닫기', black, bold) }

In LaunchedEffect(Unit): viewModel.startSession()

No comments. Fully compilable.
Imports: androidx.compose.*, androidx.camera.*, androidx.lifecycle.*, com.mofit.app.service.*, java.util.concurrent.Executors, android.util.Size

tasks.title: HomeScreen + HomeViewModel
HistoryScreen
tasks.prompt:
Write app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/ui/history/HistoryScreen.kt for Android Jetpack Compose.
Package: com.mofit.app.ui.history

ViewModel in same file:
class HistoryViewModel(application: Application) : AndroidViewModel(application):
  private val dao = (application as MofitApplication).database.workoutDao()
  val sessions: StateFlow<List<WorkoutSession>> = dao.getAllSessions().stateIn(viewModelScope, SharingStarted.WhileSubscribed(5000), emptyList())

@Composable fun HistoryScreen(viewModel: HistoryViewModel = viewModel()):
  val sessions by viewModel.sessions.collectAsState()

  Column(Modifier.fillMaxSize().background(Color.Black)):
    Text('기록', Color.White, 24.sp, Bold, Modifier.padding(16.dp))

    if (sessions.isEmpty()):
      Box(Modifier.fillMaxSize(), contentAlignment=Center):
        Text('아직 기록이 없어요', Color(0xFF666666), 16.sp)
    else:
      LazyColumn(Modifier.fillMaxSize(), contentPadding=PaddingValues(horizontal=16.dp, vertical=8.dp), verticalArrangement=Arrangement.spacedBy(10.dp)):
        items(sessions) { session ->
          val date = remember(session.date) { SimpleDateFormat('M월 d일 (E)', Locale.KOREAN).format(Date(session.date)) }
          Row(Modifier.fillMaxWidth().background(Color(0xFF1A1A1A), RoundedCornerShape(12.dp)).padding(16.dp), verticalAlignment=CenterVertically):
            Column(Modifier.weight(1f)):
              Text(if(session.exerciseType=="squat") '스쿼트' else session.exerciseType, Color.White, 16.sp, Bold)
              Text('${session.setCount}세트', Color(0xFF999999), 13.sp)
            Text('${session.totalReps}회', Color(0xFF33CC66), 24.sp, Bold)
        }

No comments. Fully compilable. Imports: androidx.compose.*, java.text.SimpleDateFormat, java.util.*, kotlinx.coroutines.flow.*

phases.name: AI Coaching Tab
phases.goal: Claude Haiku API 연동, 하루 2회(운동 전/후) 코칭 탭 완성

tasks.title: ClaudeService
tasks.prompt:
Write app/src/main/java/com/mofit/app/service/ClaudeService.kt for Android.
Package: com.mofit.app.service

enum class CoachingType { PRE_WORKOUT, POST_WORKOUT }

class ClaudeService:
  companion object { const val API_KEY = "YOUR_CLAUDE_API_KEY" }

  private val client = OkHttpClient()

  suspend fun getCoaching(profile: UserProfile, recentSessions: List<WorkoutSession>, type: CoachingType): String = withContext(Dispatchers.IO):
    val profileInfo = "성별=${profile.gender}, 키=${profile.heightCm}cm, 체중=${profile.weightKg}kg, 체형=${profile.bodyType}, 목표=${profile.goal}"
    val historyInfo = recentSessions.take(7).joinToString("\n") { s ->
      val dateStr = SimpleDateFormat("M/d", Locale.KOREAN).format(Date(s.date))
      "${dateStr}: 스쿼트 ${s.totalReps}회 ${s.setCount}세트"
    }
    val suffix = when (type) {
      CoachingType.PRE_WORKOUT -> "위 정보를 바탕으로 오늘 운동 전 조언을 한국어로 2-3문장으로 해줘. 격려하고 목표에 맞게 구체적으로."
      CoachingType.POST_WORKOUT -> "위 최근 기록을 바탕으로 운동 후 피드백을 한국어로 2-3문장으로 해줘. 노력을 인정하고 개선점을 제안해줘."
    }
    val prompt = "사용자 정보: $profileInfo\n최근 운동 기록:\n$historyInfo\n\n$suffix"

    val bodyJson = """{"model":"claude-haiku-4-5-20251001","max_tokens":300,"messages":[{"role":"user","content":"${prompt.replace("\"","\\'")}"} ]}"""
    val request = Request.Builder()
      .url("https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages")
      .post(bodyJson.toRequestBody("application/json".toMediaType()))
      .addHeader("x-api-key", API_KEY)
      .addHeader("anthropic-version", "2023-06-01")
      .build()
    val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
    val body = response.body?.string() ?: return@withContext ""
    // Parse: {"content":[{"text":"..."}]}
    val textStart = body.indexOf("\"text\":\"") + 8
    val textEnd = body.indexOf("\"", textStart)
    if (textStart > 7 && textEnd > textStart) body.substring(textStart, textEnd) else ""

Imports: com.mofit.app.data.*, kotlinx.coroutines.*, okhttp3.*, okhttp3.MediaType.Companion.toMediaType, okhttp3.RequestBody.Companion.toRequestBody, java.text.SimpleDateFormat, java.util.*
No comments. Fully compilable.
